name: Genetic Data
description: Genetic information, DNA test results, or hereditary characteristics.

regulatory_basis.name: GDPR Article 9(1)
regulatory_basis.summary: Genetic data is a special category of personal data.

regulatory_basis.name: US GINA
regulatory_basis.summary: Genetic Information Nondiscrimination Act prohibits use of genetic information in employment and health insurance decisions.

includes: DNA test results or ancestry data from genetic testing
excludes: Self-reported ancestry or ethnicity (covered by racial_ethnic_origin)
Family health history when not based on genetic testing
guidance: Genetic data in advertising is rare but growing with DTC genetic testing services. Ancestry-based segments from genetic testing services fall here; self-reported ancestry falls under racial_ethnic_origin.
